text:
(4) In case the key word used in the name proposed is the name of a person other than the name(s) of the
promoters or their close blood relatives, No objection from such other person(s) shall be attached with the
application for name. In case the name includes the name of relatives, the proof of relation shall be attached and
it shall be mandatory to furnish the significance and proof thereof for use of coined words made out of the name
of the promoters or their relatives.
